title: New Tax Regime is Default from AY2024-25
description: With effect from Assessment Year 2024-25 (Financial Year 2023-24), the New Tax Regime under Section 115BAC is the default regime for individual taxpayers. A taxpayer must actively opt out to choose the Old Regime by filing Form 10-IEA before the due date of filing (for those with business income) or by selecting the Old Regime in the ITR.

logic.if: taxpayer has not filed Form 10-IEA AND taxpayer has not selected old regime in ITR
logic.then: tax_regime = New Regime (Section 115BAC) applies by default

authority.proviso: Proviso: Taxpayers with business/profession income must file Form 10-IEA to opt for old regime.

notes: Before AY2024-25, the Old Regime was the default. This rule marks the inversion. Form 10-IEA must be filed on or before the due date u/s 139(1) to opt for old regime for business income taxpayers.
